_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin Deficiency Induces Endothelial Cell Proliferation and Retinal Neovascularization.

_contextSnippet: hypoxia (1%) exposure and VEGF amplified proliferation in NF1KD ECFC when compared with Scr ECFC. Together, VEGF and hypoxia synergistically enhance proliferation in NF1KD ECFC
details: Hypoxia and VEGF synergistically enhanced proliferation in NF1 knockdown ECFC compared to control ECFC
